title: Asthma Foundation Review
shortDescription: High-yield asthma review built from respiratory pathology, physiology, histology, and pharmacology source material.

title: Acute pediatric asthma after exercise and allergen exposure
shortDescription: An 8-year-old girl presents with worsening wheeze, chest tightness, mucus production, and hypoxemia after soccer practice and likely allergen exposure.

title: Worsening chronic asthma in primary care
shortDescription: A 34-year-old man on salbutamol and low-dose budesonide has worsening symptoms with PEFR 80% of best and needs a stepwise management decision.

title: Severe asthma exacerbation with beta2-agonist induced hypokalemia
shortDescription: A 15-year-old boy develops nausea, weakness, potassium 2.6 mEq/L, and U waves after repeated acute asthma treatments.

title: Theophylline overdose in a patient with asthma
shortDescription: A 25-year-old woman with asthma presents after theophylline overdose with seizure, hypotension, tachycardia, and respiratory distress.

title: Beta-Blocker Foundation Review
shortDescription: Foundation review of cardiovascular histology, beta-adrenergic receptor signaling, and metoprolol pharmacology based on Pharm Corner cardio lesson materials.

title: Sympathetic-driven hypertension with exertional angina
shortDescription: A patient with persistent hypertension, tachycardia, and exertional chest discomfort requires selection and monitoring of beta-blocker therapy.
